LAST_DONE:    Sub-batch 5.1a Area-derivation pure functions SHIPPED to main via squash-merge as 6686042 + governance commit pending in this session. 11 files changed, +1019 / -2. New: packages/shared/src/lib/area-derivation/match-by-name.ts (matchByName — exact name + alias lookup, case-insensitive, trimmed, filters isEnabled=true, name match wins over alias match), find-nearest-boundary.ts (findNearestBoundary — edge-distance to nearest Polygon outer ring OR LineString segment via equirectangular projection for foot-of-perpendicular + haversine for great-circle distance; default threshold 5 km per NEAREST_BOUNDARY_THRESHOLD_KM constant; defensive null on invalid lat/lon, empty boundaries, malformed geometry via console.warn; haversineKm + pointToSegmentDistanceKm helpers exported for testability), derive-area.ts (deriveArea composite per v2 spec L531-L561 algorithm — name first → nearest fallback → NULL preserves area_name verbatim; returns matchedVia: 'name' | 'nearest' | null for 5.1b AuditLog observability), types.ts (AreaBoundaryForDerivation structural subset — id+name+aliases+isEnabled+geometryType+geometryGeojson; decouples pure functions from Prisma client; callers project full AreaBoundary rows down), index.ts (barrel exports), 3 vitest test files (match-by-name 17 cases, find-nearest-boundary 25 cases including haversine Manila→Cebu ±1% + perpendicular/clamped/past-endpoint + interior-polygon-returns-nearest-edge-NOT-zero + threshold-edges + LineString + multiple-boundaries-returns-nearest-not-first + disabled-skip + malformed-skip + invalid-lat-lon + empty-boundaries, derive-area 13 cases including name-precedence-over-nearest), vitest.config.ts (bootstrap — packages/shared had no test runner before, copied jobs package style). Modified: packages/shared/package.json (added "test" script + vitest@^4.1.5 devDep — minimum scope expansion warranted since brief required vitest tests), pnpm-lock.yaml (workspace resolution). Zero external geo deps (no turf/geolib/mapbox) per project convention — math by hand, accurate to <0.1% within 5km threshold. Zero `any` types introduced. Only `console.warn` in production code (defensive geometry skip). TDD discipline: executor wrote 3 test files first, confirmed RED via vitest, then created impl files to GREEN, then refactored. Two-stage review: Stage 1 spec compliance against v2 L531-L561 PASS (algorithm steps 1+2+3 implemented exactly, threshold default 5km matches NEAREST_BOUNDARY_THRESHOLD_KM, edge-distance NOT centroid per L969, area_name preservation correct). Brief shape: new file apps/web/src/server/sync/area-derivation.ts exporting `applyAreaDerivation(prisma, entity: 'event'|'patrol'|'fuelEntry', id: string): Promise<{ areaBoundaryId: string | null; matchedVia: 'name'|'nearest'|null }>` that (1) loads the target row scoped by ID + selects areaName + locationLat/Lon (Event) OR equivalent point coordinates (Patrol — verify start_location field shape in schema before authoring brief) OR areaName-only (FuelEntry — user-typed at log time, no coordinates); (2) loads tenant's enabled AreaBoundary rows via prisma.areaBoundary.findMany({where: {tenantId, isEnabled: true}}); (3) projects boundaries to AreaBoundaryForDerivation subset; (4) calls deriveArea from packages/shared/src/lib/area-derivation; (5) updates target row with areaBoundaryId + areaDerivedAt=new Date(); (6) writes AuditLog entry with action AREA_DERIVED + metadata {entity, id, matchedVia, areaBoundaryId} per v2 L561 audit requirement. Vitest with mocked prisma covering: name-match path on Event, nearest-fallback path on Patrol, FuelEntry path (areaName-only, no point), no-match preserves areaName + areaDerivedAt still set to now, cross-tenant isolation, AuditLog entry shape.
